message:
test(build): add comprehensive unit tests for BuildSession state machine

Add 29 unit tests covering:

BuildPhase tests:
- Phase transition chain (SearchSessions → Complete)
- Terminal states (Complete/Failed have no next phase)
- Phase weights sum to 1.0
- Cumulative weights are correct
- Display formatting
- Serialization/deserialization roundtrip

BuildSession tests:
- Initial state after creation
- Overall progress calculation with phase weights
- Phase advancement and progress reset
- Failure state transition
- Timeout detection with max_duration
- Quality gates validation (min sessions/patterns)
- Remaining time calculation
- Progress at each phase
- Cannot advance past Complete or Failed

Checkpoint tests:
- Save and load checkpoint with state
- Crash simulation and resume (checkpoint persists)
- Checkpoint interval tracking

Duration parsing tests:
- Hours, minutes, seconds parsing
- Combined durations (e.g., "2h30m")
- Bare numbers default to minutes
- Empty/zero/invalid unit rejection
- Case insensitivity

Completes testing requirements for meta_skill-vc3 (Autonomous Build Mode).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
